clinic.name: CarePulse
clinic.fullName: CarePulse Clinic - Advanced Medical Care & Family Practice
clinic.heroTitle: Your Health is Our Highest Priority
clinic.heroSubtitle: Experience modern, personalized healthcare designed around your needs. Our state-of-the-art facility provides expert diagnostics, compassionate family care, and comprehensive wellness solutions.

doctor.name: Dr. Samantha Vance, MD, FACP
doctor.bioLarge: Dr. Samantha Vance is a double board-certified Internist and Pediatrician with over 14 years of clinical experience. She completed her residency at Johns Hopkins and is passionate about preventative healthcare, patient education, and integrated medicine.
doctor.bioMedium: At CarePulse, Dr. Vance combines cutting-edge diagnostics with a holistic patient-centered approach. She works one-on-one with patients of all ages to design healthy lifestyles and manage chronic health issues successfully.

contact.description: Conveniently located in the Medical District. Walk-ins welcome for emergencies, bookings recommended for consults.
contact.location: 100 Medical Plaza Drive, Suite 400, New York, NY 10016
contact.hours:
Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

services.title: General Consultation
services.description: Routine wellness checkups, primary care diagnoses, preventive advice, and customized personal health plans.

services.title: Pediatric Care
services.description: Specialized medical services for infants, children, and teens, ensuring healthy physical & mental development.

services.title: Cardiology Assessment
services.description: In-depth cardiac checkups, ECG testing, blood pressure tracking, and expert cardiovascular consulting.

services.title: Dental Cleanings & Exams
services.description: Routine cleaning, cavity fillings, cosmetic dentistry, and comprehensive oral health screenings.

services.title: Comprehensive Health Checkup
services.description: Executive screening including full blood panels, kidney and liver function tests, and diagnostic body scans.

testimonials.text: "Dr. Vance is incredible. She actually listens to your concerns and explains things in a way that makes complete sense. The scheduling was easy, and the clinic lobby looks like a premium hotel!"
testimonials.author: Alex Mercer

testimonials.text: "I brought my daughter here for a pediatric checkup. The staff made her feel completely safe and happy. Highly recommend CarePulse for anyone looking for a reliable family doctor."
testimonials.author: Clara Rodriguez

testimonials.text: "Superb diagnostic facilities. They ran my executive checkup and provided clear, actionable reports in just 24 hours. The online appointment scheduling worked flawlessly."
testimonials.author: David Bennett
